$comment: Placeholder fixture for Phase 1.6 exemplar UC; replace with production-grade sample-data as part of Phase 4.5 sandbox validation.
description: Fixture exercising positive scenario for 22.39.1: When an incident is classified 'breach' (per incident_register.csv) and no regulator-submission record exists 90 minutes before the applicable SLA deadline, the UC fires with a warning; at breach, it fires at severity critical.
